c1.speaker: otto
c1.line: Big day, Mr. Gibbons. The whole district's been percolating for a week — you can't rush the fiftieth year, but it's rushing anyway.

c3.speaker: otto
c3.line: The Festival Blend. Fifty years in the making — which is to say, same beans, more hope. Sit anywhere. Tonight, the vault. Tomorrow, everyone tells you they always knew what was inside.
